reviews.review_title: Genuinely not worth it in the slightest
reviews.review_description: not only does this game have HORRIBLE movement it also has horrible gameplay! there are TONS AND TONS of locomotion on the vr, yet they chose the worst one, moving your head from side to side? it is extremely buggy, and hard to control. For a 10$ game, this should be free. OVERALL: DO NOT, AND I MEAN DO NOT, BUY THIS. IT IS STRAIGHT GARBAGE.
The way you move and steal the artifact is fun but the ai needs to be smarter and it also gives you a workout from the movement
Movement is a dupster fire and and the game feels unfinished to put it politly and looks like devs are not caring either as im not the only one with issues about the movement
movement is hard to use

Lack of stick turn takes what i caN tell would be a super fun movement system from "slick Unique and fun" to "unplayable monstrosity". Is that why it is free? you guys think it was a flop but really you just didn't read the reviews. I repeat, add stick turn to instantly create a classic vr title. I will wait here hoping.

This game is amazing. Just add some Better graphics cos better graphics means better games and better games means more players and more players means no more a hidden gem (wich is good if you want more players)
Good game

reviews.review_title: The movement system is genuinely idiotic
reviews.review_description:
There are literally infinite movement systems that could be chosen for VR, and this is by far the absolute worst, least functional and unintuitive system I've ever used.
Seems like a really fun game otherwise. Definitely not putting Hard Drive out of business any time soon, as it needs to.
This is all to say nothing of the fact I had to search this explicitly by name after discovering it on itch.
Just let us use joystick movement or come up with some other solution, your gimmick clearly isnt working and I would never pay 10 usd for this knowing what Im actually getting.
Movement sucks graphics suck and it feels unfinished. Just saw it was free and regret getting it.

man not so good the running physics are bad and the bots just make it impossible to play because of how much of the trail gets left behind it is physically impossible to achieve that much trail behind their bags also it's hard to turn and having to run like your skating makes it even worse
Actually a good game

reviews.review_title: Very interesting,but not for the movemet
reviews.review_description:
The game idea is interesting, and I had fun while doing the tutorial and some bots match, but the locomotion system is just to brutal.

Even if I got pretty quickly the hang of how to move around, the problem is that you still have to basically shake your head left and right to move, and is really not comfortable doing this over and over (not only for the dizzyness of doing this motion with an heavy object on your head for the entire duration of the match, which can be 5min more or less).

I think the swing of the arms as an alternative could be considered.

Also in both cases could be interesting adding more momentum for each arms or head swing, so you spend less time swinging and more time sliding (and could improve comfort).

I hope the game to grow, since an ice skating game is really interesting for VR.

Thank you so much for the game.  This game is one of my new favorites. after a few hours of playing, im in control 80%+ of the time. its easy to add multiplayer, played with 4 others plus 2 bots, and little crowded but after the ease of removing the bots, its a good challenge with friends.  I hope for more arenas, and i wish the lobby for the multiplayer mode, you had time to breathe and control the start of the next match!   great game and i hope for more and bigger!

reviews.review_title: Serious potential to rival echo vr!
reviews.review_description: The feeling of speed is great in this, its got a bit of a learning curve, but it's worth it. I think it needs an option to snap turn Instead of turn in real life for users with smaller spaces.  Definitely going to spend more time in this one

The idea for this game is excellent, and when I first entered the main arena, it looked great and I was very impressed, however I just couldn't get used to the movement, moving side to side. I believe this game would benefit more with Gorilla Tag style movement, using your arms to move around the arena. The current movement system just wasn't for me.

If the movement system works for you, then you will get a lot of entertainment out of this, but I believe this would be more popular if the option was there to switch movement styles, especially with the Gorilla Tag community.

developer_response.body:
UPDATE: I have rethought the locomotion and removed most of the complexity and hidden physics. Now you should be able to move freely and effortlessly, focusing on other game aspects! Please give it a try and let me know how it goes!

maybe a mode, where you move like in Gorilla Tag? I just didn't want to create another Gorilla Tag, but as a game mode, could be pretty interesting! Thanks for idea, let me try that in one of the upcoming builds. And yes, one thing I didn't want is to use joystick to move, especially to skate around. 

As some help, I can suggest you try to do deep steps left and right, with it your head will move enough to gain speed. Don't use your hands to move, they won't help, and don't tilt your head or small of the back, it helps only with steering, moving accelerating. Deep steps left and right will help a lot and don't require a lot of work, although it will feel like a workout at first :) The first step in the tutorial shows exactly how to do that in the most efficient way. 

Our Skader friend has shown the hidden secrets of the locomotion here: https://youtu.be/115Ay1q8jwQ?t=310

Let me know how it goes, it does need some time to adjust. Easy to start, hard to master ;)

And thank you for the honest review!!!

reviews.review_description: For only a cheap price you can play this great game,with skating locomotion, fun battles and more, with multiplayer and single player modes,this is a special game buy it now!!!!

reviews.review_title: Part of beta tests- recommend it!
reviews.review_description: The game is very Innovative movement skating like mechanics, plus outstanding glossy maps. The game is easy to learn and hard to master!

developer_response.body: I’ so happy that you enjoyed the gam, locomotion and the glossy ice with reflections, something which doesn’t add gameplay value but for some reason I spent ton of days and nights 🙃 and that you found it easy to learn but hard to master, this was my plan day 1, let see how it can stand true with the Meta Quest community! Happy Skading!

reviews.review_description:
SKADER is when Tron meets Gorilla Tag! Easy to start moving but hard to master, the arena is perfect shiny ice and you can skate over it.

- LOCOMOTION: No joystick to move around, you need to work hard with your body to gain at least some speed, jump, brake, and even do a 360 in the air for an achievement! 
- MULTIPLAYER: It's a multiplayer game but the option to play with bots only is available and they can be hard to beat
- GAMEPLAY: the goal is to get hold of the cat and run with it until someone stuns you and gets the cat, then everybody starts to skate after the new player. You leave a trail behind you, pick up some powerups and use your Glaive to stun other skaders
- VR: you do need to stay and turn 360 in place, no need to have a room-scale setup but playing in a chair won't fly
Movement takes a bit of getting used to, but its very fun one once you have.

developer_response.body: Thanks, Lag for the feedback and review! Have fun Skading!
